---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<div class="reading-progress" id="reading-progress"></div>

<section class="hero-section">
  <h1>👋 Hey, I'm Andrew Fuller</h1>
  <p class="hero-tagline">
    Data analyst & R developer working in health informatics. I turn messy clinical data into
    insights that improve rehabilitation outcomes across Australia.
  </p>
  <div class="hero-badges">
    <span class="badge-pill">📊 R & Shiny</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">🏥 Health Data</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">📈 Data Visualisation</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">🔬 Clinical Informatics</span>
    <span class="badge-pill">🗄️ SQL</span>
  </div>
</section>
```

## What I Do

```{=html}
<div class="feature-grid">
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">📊</div>
    <h3>Data Analysis & Reporting</h3>
    <p>Building automated reports and dashboards that surface meaningful patterns in clinical rehabilitation data.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">🖥️</div>
    <h3>Shiny App Development</h3>
    <p>Creating interactive web applications in R/Shiny that let clinicians explore their own data without needing to code.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">🗺️</div>
    <h3>Geospatial Analysis</h3>
    <p>Mapping service coverage, patient flows, and accessibility gaps across Australian health regions.</p>
  </div>
  <div class="feature-card">
    <div class="feature-icon">📝</div>
    <h3>Writing & Teaching</h3>
    <p>Sharing what I learn about R, data workflows, and the quirks of working with health data in the real world.</p>
  </div>
</div>
```

## Recent Posts

```{=html}
<div id="recent-posts-placeholder"></div>
```

::: {.listing}
```{r}
#| echo: false
#| output: false
# This listing block is rendered by Quarto — see blog/index.qmd
```
:::

[View all posts →](blog/index.qmd){.btn .btn-primary style="margin-top:1rem;"}

---

## Tech Stack

```{=html}
<div style="margin: 1rem 0;">
  <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Shiny</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Quarto</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">ggplot2</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">dplyr</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">tidyr</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">bslib</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">leaflet</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">echarts4r</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
  <span class="skill-tag">GitHub Actions</span>
</div>
```

---

*Currently based in Wollongong, NSW 🇦🇺 — working on data and analytics for rehabilitation medicine.*

```{=html}
<script>
// Reading progress bar
const progressBar = document.getElementById('reading-progress');
if (progressBar) {
  window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
    const scrollTop = window.scrollY;
    const docHeight = document.documentElement.scrollHeight - window.innerHeight;
    const progress = docHeight > 0 ? (scrollTop / docHeight) * 100 : 0;
    progressBar.style.width = progress + '%';
  });
}

// Back to top button
const btn = document.createElement('button');
btn.className = 'back-to-top';
btn.innerHTML = '↑';
btn.title = 'Back to top';
btn.onclick = () => window.scrollTo({ top: 0, behavior: 'smooth' });
document.body.appendChild(btn);

window.addEventListener('scroll', () => {
  btn.classList.toggle('visible', window.scrollY > 300);
});
</script>
```
